---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem

What user or system problem does this solve?

## Proposed outcome

Describe the intended behavior and user-facing result.

## Scope notes

Call out any likely impact on CLI, API, TUI, persistence, or docs.

## Additional context

Include examples, references, or constraints.
